textByHash.956c022f2a916e828acb92171007224fe1602339: I would beg my lord not to give in so easily to his very compassionate nature. We know not if these people are loyal Saradomin supporters, my liege.
textByHash.acb17ea35f902064b9669cf7132e7e2a39d5f022: As are many, my young friend. Is the king meant to leave Misthalin unguarded on the whim of some errant adventurer?
textByHash.590af817bbae9b4937862bf9cde3bbd7bb6c15d1: My lord, this course of action will lead to very severe consequences! Your interference in Morytania will likely upset the balance and could send the world into another cataclysmic God War.
textByHash.6f6278c1ab04809ad61cc12d4ef6247d024394af: There is no proof that Drakan has invaded Misthalin, my lord!
textByHash.0ec9693a55fe46bfac2e2e788eb10465be92fc3e: Being knocked out by agents unknown does not constitute evidence. In fact, it's something that the most inexperienced of local folk could accomplish!
textByHash.90bab6414813858e2ec542c6d1a03e6c7c8188c4: I am afraid with the Guthixian edicts regarding religious balance, there is little else we can do.
textByHash.55b2e46a6bde1f2613fb21dc20dcb0e999059cfc: Indeed. They were put in place by Guthix himself at the end of the God Wars. At least, so his followers claim. All of us must abide by them, lest the world fall into ruin again.
textByHash.5fdb62bec94faab8ea89d7fa4e1eeae70913e5af: An apt description, my lord. The edicts are likely to be little more than propaganda created by the followers of Guthix.
textByHash.517ef477b3586d5188f5676a43dc70a5acb1ad07: The edicts need closer study before we can be sure.
textByHash.8b5e2915f887d4745969d2cb416af5b53865a404: As you say, it will take some time. We now pay the price for our lack of foresight in letting Guthixian edicts restrict the might of Saradomin's will.
textByHash.fe27ac5bc5a24a9ffd4a1230035af6b196fa4080: Yes sire, there are some papers to sign, but essentially we can start work on this right away.
textByHash.0ac8a9b57fcc955a3b5f61ab37b196b4451ce462: Hold your disrespectful tongue! How dare you address the king in that way? We should throw you in the stocks!
textByHash.4f12d8c3ac9bd0bab721eae604644e6e91bc2a9f: Is it nothing then to have an audience with the king? Your lack of respect astonishes me. How you have survived so long with such disgraceful manners is nothing short of a miracle!
textByHash.f2e0bb5c4e91cc85021d0e20fbf583324fcd5bfe: What's going on? Where have all these zombies come from?
textByHash.beae9cc9c60fff31f1c01aef54e7fd95c914454c: But I don't know how to use the shield... No one does.
textByHash.3ad1e98afee819681ba68ab79be818cb033f3305: Nothing special seems to be happening.
textByHash.720250adbbbf1d220f9f0cdf4cd8d796278731b9: Well then you need to find them before these zombies kill us all!
textByHash.7b5bf8204f34cae4ac9ff395887d0c1048dcb102: Nothing special seems to be happening. Why do you think I'm descended from an original elder of Avarrocka, anyway?
textByHash.b124aaed7c0e1b5e31b7e98b305ec607acead0ff: Smart thinking, but also flawed. I'm not actually a blood descendant of the Raisphers. My great-grandfather was adopted into the family.
textByHash.bddbc9ad6c94d467cc3cddec09dc16b5f74c88b5: Well, none with the name Raispher. The last descendant of the Raispher line was a lady named Lucinda Raispher. She married into the Fitzharmon family.
textByHash.82dcacbce1c65c3ec4a5d9f6afc9c9cb6237ce39: Gather the soldiers? My lord, do you know what this means?
textByHash.51d6911c6b3518c01c9db38c77046c6b5aaccdc6: Chieftain Brundt? You would ally with those barbarians?
textByHash.f9eb00236149f36d14f14428939d937dfb3edc97: Please only talk to the King if it's important. He has a heavy burden to bear with the running of his Kingdom.
textByHash.45435e5732c62792da1340f38b0c5d5f4bc474cd: Apologies! Allow me to introduce myself: my name is Aeonisig Raispher, special advisor to King Roald on spiritual matters.
textByHash.89582316bc6b3076d16d1c8e10eca88c360f333f: It means that some decisions the King has to make might have unforeseen repercussions on the nation's spiritual sensibilities. My duty is to ensure that Saradominist ideals are not stomped underfoot.
textByHash.3238690d2964dc234262752fa7c1adb765644263: My main function is to ensure that King Roald is apprised of all options, especially those that favour the righteous followers of Saradomin.
textByHash.70fb2ee515de0728af8aa179c03c625b28e90df2: What an interesting perspective you have! Totally unworkable of course, but interesting nonetheless.
textByHash.44de95869871a32f3cc7595056cebbfdccfe4c8b: I took my religious and combat training in several parts of the known world. I've also fought despicable beasts in the wilderness in Saradomin's name. Needless to say I have great experience in the ways of the world and am
textByHash.c96e87ae7ea67dd193160f5882ebdc88bf458539: an invaluable aid to his lordship's decision-making process.
textByHash.a02865390e028748ce90a6d822c9298e22b333ee: The King of Misthalin, like any great leader, always requires the best advice and the best advisors. He very often summons occasional advisors to help him in certain situations, but it was felt by the Church of Saradomin
textByHash.22db56b43f19c604e3c41c2239913be68b669ca6: that a full time advisor on religious matters was needed to ensure fair treatment of Saradomin's followers.
textByHash.2aff165216610d025bb59a8e78d9f7fc0593dc70: Because I simply won't stand for it, that's why! Now, enough of your impertinent questions. I have work to do!
